name: Customer Service Bot
description: Friendly customer service chatbot for FAQs

intents.name: greeting
responses: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hi there! What can I do for you?
Welcome! How may I assist you?

intents.name: order_status
utterances: What's the status of my delivery?
responses: I can help you track your order! Please provide your order number.
To check your order status, I'll need your order ID.
Happy to help! What's your order number?

intents.name: return_policy
utterances: How do I return an item?
How long do I have to return?
responses: We offer 30-day returns for most items. Would you like more details?
Items can be returned within 30 days of purchase in original condition.
Sure! We have a 30-day return window. Need help starting a return?

intents.name: payment_issue
responses: Sorry to hear you're having payment issues! Our team can help resolve this.
Payment problems can be frustrating. Let me connect you with our support team.
I'll help you sort out your payment issue right away!

intents.name: goodbye
responses: Thank you for contacting us! Have a great day!
Goodbye! Feel free to reach out anytime.
See you later! Thanks for visiting.
